rewritten_query:
WITH combined_sales AS (
 SELECT 
 'store' AS channel,
 s.s_store_id AS id,
 ss.ss_ext_sales_price,
 sr.sr_return_amt,
 ss.ss_net_profit,
 sr.sr_net_loss,
 ss.ss_wholesale_cost,
 d.d_date,
 i.i_current_price,
 i.i_category,
 p.p_channel_email,
 p.p_channel_tv,
 p.p_channel_radio,
 p.p_channel_press,
 p.p_channel_event
 FROM store_sales ss
 LEFT JOIN store_returns sr ON ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk AND ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
 JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
 JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
 JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
 JOIN promotion p ON ss.ss_promo_sk = p.p_promo_sk
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
 'catalog' AS channel,
 cp.cp_catalog_page_id AS id,
 cs.cs_ext_sales_price,
 cr.cr_return_amount AS sr_return_amt,
 cs.cs_net_profit,
 cr.cr_net_loss,
 cs.cs_wholesale_cost,
 d.d_date,
 i.i_current_price,
 i.i_category,
 p.p_channel_email,
 p.p_channel_tv,
 p.p_channel_radio,
 p.p_channel_press,
 p.p_channel_event
 FROM catalog_sales cs
 LEFT JOIN catalog_returns cr ON cs.cs_item_sk = cr.cr_item_sk AND cs.cs_order_number = cr.cr_order_number
 JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
 JOIN catalog_page cp ON cs.cs_catalog_page_sk = cp.cp_catalog_page_sk
 JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
 JOIN promotion p ON cs.cs_promo_sk = p.p_promo_sk
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
 'web' AS channel,
 w.web_site_id AS id,
 ws.ws_ext_sales_price,
 wr.wr_return_amt AS sr_return_amt,
 ws.ws_net_profit,
 wr.wr_net_loss,
 ws.ws_wholesale_cost,
 d.d_date,
 i.i_current_price,
 i.i_category,
 p.p_channel_email,
 p.p_channel_tv,
 p.p_channel_radio,
 p.p_channel_press,
 p.p_channel_event
 FROM web_sales ws
 LEFT JOIN web_returns wr ON ws.ws_item_sk = wr.wr_item_sk AND ws.ws_order_number = wr.wr_order_number
 JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
 JOIN web_site w ON ws.ws_web_site_sk = w.web_site_sk
 JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
 JOIN promotion p ON ws.ws_promo_sk = p.p_promo_sk
)
SELECT 
 channel,
 id,
 SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
 SUM(COALESCE(sr_return_amt, 0)) AS total_returns,
 SUM(ss_net_profit - COALESCE(sr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit
FROM combined_sales
WHERE 
 d_date BETWEEN DATE '2001-08-11' AND DATE '2001-08-11' + INTERVAL '30 days'
 AND i_current_price > 50
 AND p_channel_email = 'N'
 AND p_channel_tv = 'N'
 AND p_channel_radio = 'Y'
 AND p_channel_press = 'N'
 AND p_channel_event = 'Y'
 AND wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60
 AND i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports')
GROUP BY ROLLUP (channel, id)
ORDER BY channel, id
LIMIT 100

,cr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 cr_dev        ,wr_item_qty        ,wr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 wr_dev rewritten_query:
WITH valid_dates AS (
 SELECT d_date
 FROM date_dim
 WHERE d_month_seq IN (
 SELECT d_month_seq
 FROM date_dim
 WHERE d_date IN ('1998-03-05', '1998-06-15', '1998-09-12', '1998-10-31')
 )
),

sr_items AS (
 SELECT i_item_id AS item_id, 
 SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_item_qty
 FROM store_returns
 JOIN item ON sr_item_sk = i_item_sk
 JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
 WHERE d_date IN (SELECT d_date FROM valid_dates)
 AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Sports')
 AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 AND 45
 AND sr_return_amt BETWEEN 141 * sr_return_quantity AND 170 * sr_return_quantity
 AND sr_return_quantity > 0
 AND sr_reason_sk IN (6, 29, 42, 45, 62)
 GROUP BY i_item_id
),





cr_items AS (
 SELECT i_item_id AS item_id, 
 SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS cr_item_qty
 FROM catalog_returns
 JOIN item ON cr_item_sk = i_item_sk
 JOIN date_dim ON cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
 WHERE d_date IN (SELECT d_date FROM valid_dates)
 AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Sports')
 AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 AND 45
 AND cr_return_amount BETWEEN 141 * cr_return_quantity AND 170 * cr_return_quantity
 AND cr_return_quantity > 0
 AND cr_reason_sk IN (6, 29, 42, 45, 62)
 GROUP BY i_item_id
),



wr_items AS (
 SELECT i_item_id AS item_id, 
 SUM(wr_return_quantity) AS wr_item_qty
 FROM web_returns
 JOIN item ON wr_item_sk = i_item_sk
 JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
 WHERE d_date IN (SELECT d_date FROM valid_dates)
 AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Sports')
 AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 AND 45
 AND wr_return_amt BETWEEN 141 * wr_return_quantity AND 170 * wr_return_quantity
 AND wr_return_quantity > 0
 AND wr_reason_sk IN (6, 29, 42, 45, 62)
 GROUP BY i_item_id
)

SELECT 
 sr_items.item_id,
 sr_item_qty,
 sr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty + cr_item_qty + wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 AS sr_dev,
 cr_item_qty,
 cr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty + cr_item_qty + wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 AS cr_dev,
 wr_item_qty,
 wr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty + cr_item_qty + wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 AS wr_dev,
 (sr_item_qty + cr_item_qty + wr_item_qty)/3.0 AS average
FROM sr_items
JOIN cr_items ON sr_items.item_id = cr_items.item_id
JOIN wr_items ON sr_items.item_id = wr_items.item_id
ORDER BY sr_items.item_id, sr_item_qty
LIMIT 100

 cr.cr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS cr_dev,
 wr.wr_item_qty,
 wr.wr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS wr_dev,
 (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 AS average
FROM sr_items sr
JOIN cr_items cr ON sr.item_id = cr.item_id
JOIN wr_items wr ON sr.item_id = wr.item_id
ORDER BY sr.item_id, sr.sr_item_qty
LIMIT 100

 customer_demographics cd2, customer_address, date_dim, reason  where ws_web_page_sk = wp_web_page_sk    and ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk    and ws_order_number = wr_order_number    and ws_sold_date_sk =      cd1.cd_education_status = 'College'      and      cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 50.00 and 100.00     )    or     ( cd2.cd_education_status      and      ws_sales_price between 150.00 and 200.00     )    )    and    (     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('GA', 'IN', 'VA')      and ws_net_profit between 100 and 200     )     or     (      ca_country = 'United States'      and      ca_state in ('MT', 'NM', 'OR')      and ws_net_profit between 150 and 300     )     or     ( rewritten_query:
SELECT substring(r_reason_desc,1,20),
 AVG(ws_quantity),
 AVG(wr_refunded_cash),
 AVG(wr_fee)
FROM web_sales ws
JOIN web_returns wr ON ws.ws_item_sk = wr.wr_item_sk AND ws.ws_order_number = wr.wr_order_number
JOIN web_page wp ON ws.ws_web_page_sk = wp.wp_web_page_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd1 ON cd1.cd_demo_sk = wr.wr_refunded_cdemo_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON cd2.cd_demo_sk = wr.wr_returning_cdemo_sk
JOIN customer_address ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = wr.wr_refunded_addr_sk
JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN reason r ON r.r_reason_sk = wr.wr_reason_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 1998
 AND (
 (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd2.cd_marital_status = 'W' 
 AND cd1.cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree' AND cd2.cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree' 
 AND ws.ws_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00)
 OR
 (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd2.cd_marital_status = 'S' 
 AND cd1.cd_education_status = 'College' AND cd2.cd_education_status = 'College' 
 AND ws.ws_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00)
 OR
 (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'D' AND cd2.cd_marital_status = 'D' 
 AND cd1.cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree' AND cd2.cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree' 
 AND ws.ws_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00)
 )
 AND (
 (ca.ca_country = 'United States' AND ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IN', 'VA') AND ws.ws_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)
 OR
 (ca.ca_country = 'United States' AND ca.ca_state IN ('MT', 'NM', 'OR') AND ws.ws_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)
 OR
 (ca.ca_country = 'United States' AND ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH') AND ws.ws_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250)
 )
GROUP BY substring(r_reason_desc,1,20)
ORDER BY substring(r_reason_desc,1,20),
 AVG(ws_quantity),
 AVG(wr_refunded_cash),
 AVG(wr_fee)
LIMIT 100

rewritten_query:
SELECT MIN(ws_quantity), MIN(wr_refunded_cash), MIN(wr_fee), MIN(ws_item_sk), MIN(wr_order_number), MIN(cd1.cd_demo_sk), MIN(cd2.cd_demo_sk)
FROM web_sales ws
JOIN web_returns wr ON ws.ws_item_sk = wr.wr_item_sk AND ws.ws_order_number = wr.wr_order_number
JOIN web_page wp ON ws.ws_web_page_sk = wp.wp_web_page_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd1 ON cd1.cd_demo_sk = wr.wr_refunded_cdemo_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON cd2.cd_demo_sk = wr.wr_returning_cdemo_sk
JOIN customer_address ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = wr.wr_refunded_addr_sk
JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk AND d.d_year = 1999
JOIN reason r ON r.r_reason_sk = wr.wr_reason_sk
WHERE (cd1.cd_marital_status = cd2.cd_marital_status AND cd1.cd_education_status = cd2.cd_education_status)
AND (
 (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'U' AND cd1.cd_education_status = 'Primary' AND ws.ws_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00)
 OR (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'D' AND cd1.cd_education_status = '4 yr Degree' AND ws.ws_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00)
 OR (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd1.cd_education_status = 'College' AND ws.ws_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00)
)
AND (
 ca.ca_country = 'United States'
 AND (
 (ca.ca_state IN ('NE', 'TN', 'TX') AND ws.ws_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)
 OR (ca.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NY', 'VA') AND ws.ws_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)
 OR (ca.ca_state IN ('MS', 'TN', 'TX') AND ws.ws_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250)
 )
)

original_query: select count(*) from ((select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from store_sales, date_dim, customer        where store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and ss_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from catalog_sales, date_dim, customer        where catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and cs_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          )        except       (select distinct c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date        from web_sales, date_dim, customer        where web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk          and web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk          and d_month_seq between 1220 and 1220+11          and ws_list_price between 190 and 219          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953          and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78          ) ) cool_cust
rewritten_query:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
 SELECT DISTINCT c.c_last_name, c.c_first_name, d.d_date
 FROM store_sales ss
 JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
 JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
 WHERE d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1220 AND 1231
 AND ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 190 AND 219
 AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
 AND ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78
 AND NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1
 FROM catalog_sales cs
 JOIN date_dim cd ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = cd.d_date_sk
 JOIN customer cu ON cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = cu.c_customer_sk
 WHERE cd.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1220 AND 1231
 AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 190 AND 219
 AND cu.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
 AND cs.cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78
 AND cu.c_last_name = c.c_last_name
 AND cu.c_first_name = c.c_first_name
 AND cd.d_date = d.d_date
 )
 AND NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1
 FROM web_sales ws
 JOIN date_dim wd ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = wd.d_date_sk
 JOIN customer wu ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = wu.c_customer_sk
 WHERE wd.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1220 AND 1231
 AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 190 AND 219
 AND wu.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
 AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 78
 AND wu.c_last_name = c.c_last_name
 AND wu.c_first_name = c.c_first_name
 AND wd.d_date = d.d_date
 )
) AS cool_cust

 JOIN date_dim d ON s.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
 WHERE d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192+11
 AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1941 AND 1947

 AND s.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27

 WHERE cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
 AND cd.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192+11
 AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 271 AND 300
 AND cs.cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 27
 )
 AND NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM web_sales ws
 JOIN date_dim wd ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = wd.d_date_sk
 WHERE ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
 AND wd.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192+11
 AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 271 AND 300

 )
) cool_cust

original_query: select           cc_call_center_id Call_Center,         cc_name Call_Center_Name,         cc_manager Manager,         sum(cr_net_loss) Returns_Loss from         call_center,         catalog_returns,         date_dim,         customer,         customer_address,         customer_demographics,         household_demographics where         cr_call_center_sk       = cc_call_center_sk and     cr_returned_date_sk     = d_date_sk and     cr_returning_customer_sk= c_customer_sk and     cd_demo_sk              = c_current_cdemo_sk and     hd_demo_sk              = c_current_hdemo_sk and     ca_address_sk           = c_current_addr_sk and     d_year                  = 1999  and     d_moy                   = 5 and     ( (cd_marital_status       = 'M' and cd_education_status     = 'Unknown')         or(cd_marital_status       = 'W' and cd_education_status     = 'Advanced Degree')) and     hd_buy_potential like '0-500%' and     ca_gmt_offset           = -7 group by cc_call_center_id,cc_name,cc_manager,cd_marital_status,cd_education_status order by sum(cr_net_loss) desc
rewritten_query: SELECT cc.cc_call_center_id AS Call_Center, cc.cc_name AS Call_Center_Name, cc.cc_manager AS Manager, SUM(cr.cr_net_loss) AS Returns_Loss FROM date_dim d INNER JOIN catalog_returns cr ON cr.cr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk INNER JOIN call_center cc ON cr.cr_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk INNER JOIN customer c ON cr.cr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk INNER JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk INNER JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk INNER JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk WHERE d.d_year = 1999 AND d.d_moy = 5 AND ((cd.cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Unknown') OR (cd.cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree')) AND hd.hd_buy_potential LIKE '0-500%' AND ca.ca_gmt_offset = -7 GROUP BY cc.cc_call_center_id, cc.cc_name, cc.cc_manager, cd.cd_marital_status, cd.cd_education_status ORDER BY SUM(cr.cr_net_loss) DESC

original_query: select           min(cc_call_center_id),         min(cc_name),         min(cc_manager),         min(cr_net_loss),         min(cr_item_sk),         min(cr_order_number) from         call_center,         catalog_returns,         date_dim,         customer,         customer_address,         customer_demographics,         household_demographics where         cr_call_center_sk       = cc_call_center_sk and     cr_returned_date_sk     = d_date_sk and     cr_returning_customer_sk= c_customer_sk and     cd_demo_sk              = c_current_cdemo_sk and     hd_demo_sk              = c_current_hdemo_sk and     ca_address_sk           = c_current_addr_sk and     d_year                  = 1999  and     d_moy                   = 5 and     ( (cd_marital_status       = 'M' and cd_education_status     = 'Unknown')         or(cd_marital_status       = 'W' and cd_education_status     = 'Advanced Degree')) and     hd_buy_potential like '0-500%' and     ca_gmt_offset           = -7
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
 MIN(cc_call_center_id), 
 MIN(cc_name), 
 MIN(cc_manager), 
 MIN(cr_net_loss), 
 MIN(cr_item_sk), 
 MIN(cr_order_number)
FROM catalog_returns
JOIN date_dim 
 ON cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
 AND d_year = 1999
 AND d_moy = 5
JOIN call_center 
 ON cr_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk
JOIN customer 
 ON cr_returning_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics 
 ON cd_demo_sk = c_current_cdemo_sk
 AND ( (cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd_education_status = 'Unknown')
 OR (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree') )
JOIN household_demographics 
 ON hd_demo_sk = c_current_hdemo_sk
 AND hd_buy_potential LIKE '0-500%'
JOIN customer_address 
 ON ca_address_sk = c_current_addr_sk
 AND ca_gmt_offset = -7

rewritten_query: SELECT MIN(cc.cc_call_center_id), MIN(cc.cc_name), MIN(cc.cc_manager), MIN(cr.cr_net_loss), MIN(cr.cr_item_sk), MIN(cr.cr_order_number) FROM call_center cc JOIN catalog_returns cr ON cr.cr_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk JOIN date_dim d ON cr.cr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk AND d.d_year = 1999 AND d.d_moy = 3 JOIN customer c ON cr.cr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk AND ((cd.cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Unknown') OR (cd.cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree')) JOIN household_demographics hd ON hd.hd_demo_sk = c.c_current_hdemo_sk AND hd.hd_buy_potential LIKE '>10000%' JOIN customer_address ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk AND ca.ca_gmt_offset = -7

original_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as "Excess Discount Amount" from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 394 and 593 or i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '2002-02-11' and         cast('2002-02-11' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '2002-02-11' and                              cast('2002-02-11' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 85 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
 SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS "Excess Discount Amount"
FROM 
 web_sales ws
JOIN 
 item i ON i.i_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
JOIN 
 date_dim d ON d.d_date_sk = ws.ws_sold_date_sk
JOIN 
 (
 SELECT 
 ws_item_sk, 
 1.3 * AVG(ws_ext_discount_amt) AS avg_amt
 FROM 
 web_sales
 JOIN 
 date_dim ON d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk
 WHERE 
 ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88
 AND d_date BETWEEN '2002-02-11' AND (CAST('2002-02-11' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '90' DAY)
 AND ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 0.85 AND 1.00
 GROUP BY 
 ws_item_sk
 ) sub 
 ON sub.ws_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
WHERE 
 (i.i_manufact_id BETWEEN 394 AND 593 OR i.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports'))
 AND d.d_date BETWEEN '2002-02-11' AND (CAST('2002-02-11' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '90' DAY)
 AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88
 AND ws.ws_ext_discount_amt > sub.avg_amt
ORDER BY 
 SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) 
LIMIT 100

original_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as "Excess Discount Amount" from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 749 and 948 or i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '2001-01-31' and         cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '2001-01-31' and                              cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 17 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100
rewritten_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as "Excess Discount Amount" from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 749 and 948 or i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '2001-01-31' and         cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '2001-01-31' and                              cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 17 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100

original_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as "Excess Discount Amount" from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 423 and 622 or i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '1999-03-22' and         cast('1999-03-22' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '1999-03-22' and                              cast('1999-03-22' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 69 * 0.01 AND 84 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100
rewritten_query:
WITH ItemAvg AS (
 SELECT 
 ws_item_sk,
 1.3 * AVG(ws_ext_discount_amt) AS avg_13x
 FROM web_sales
 JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk
 WHERE 
 ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
 AND ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 0.69 AND 0.84
 AND d_date BETWEEN '1999-03-22' AND (CAST('1999-03-22' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '90' DAY)
 GROUP BY ws_item_sk
)
SELECT 
 SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS "Excess Discount Amount"
FROM web_sales ws
JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN ItemAvg ia ON i.i_item_sk = ia.ws_item_sk
WHERE 
 (i.i_manufact_id BETWEEN 423 AND 622 
 OR i.i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women'))
 AND d.d_date BETWEEN '1999-03-22' AND (CAST('1999-03-22' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '90' DAY)
 AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
 AND ws.ws_ext_discount_amt > ia.avg_13x
ORDER BY SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) 
LIMIT 100

original_query: select     count(distinct ws_order_number) as "order count"   ,sum(ws_ext_ship_cost) as "total shipping cost"   ,sum(ws_net_profit) as "total net profit" from    web_sales ws1   ,date_dim   ,customer_address   ,web_site where     d_date between '2000-10-01' and            cast('2000-10-01' as date) + interval '60' day and ws1.ws_ship_date_sk = d_date_sk and ws1.ws_ship_addr_sk = ca_address_sk and ca_state in ('IA','IN','MT'             ,'NE' ,'OK' ,'TX') and ws1.ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk and web_gmt_offset >= -7 and ws1.ws_list_price between 141 and 170 and exists (select *             from web_sales ws2             where ws1.ws_order_number = ws2.ws_order_number               and ws1.ws_warehouse_sk <> ws2.ws_warehouse_sk) and not exists(select *                from web_returns wr1                where ws1.ws_order_number = wr1.wr_order_number                and wr1.wr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)                ) order by count(distinct ws_order_number) limit 100

original_query: select     count(distinct ws_order_number) as "order count"   ,sum(ws_ext_ship_cost) as "total shipping cost"   ,sum(ws_net_profit) as "total net profit" from    web_sales ws1   ,date_dim   ,customer_address   ,web_site where     d_date between '1998-9-01' and            cast('1998-9-01' as date) + interval '60' day and ws1.ws_ship_date_sk = d_date_sk and ws1.ws_ship_addr_sk = ca_address_sk and ca_state in ('IN','KS','MD'             ,'NE' ,'OK' ,'VA') and ws1.ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk and web_gmt_offset >= -7 and ws1.ws_list_price between 111 and 140 and exists (select *             from web_sales ws2             where ws1.ws_order_number = ws2.ws_order_number               and ws1.ws_warehouse_sk <> ws2.ws_warehouse_sk) and not exists(select *                from web_returns wr1                where ws1.ws_order_number = wr1.wr_order_number                and wr1.wr_reason_sk in (20, 27, 54, 55, 64)                ) order by count(distinct ws_order_number) limit 100

original_query: select     count(distinct ws_order_number) as "order count"   ,sum(ws_ext_ship_cost) as "total shipping cost"   ,sum(ws_net_profit) as "total net profit" from    web_sales ws1   ,date_dim   ,customer_address   ,web_site where     d_date between '2000-10-01' and            cast('2000-10-01' as date) + interval '60' day and ws1.ws_ship_date_sk = d_date_sk and ws1.ws_ship_addr_sk = ca_address_sk and ca_state in ('OR','SC','TX'             ,'VA' ,'WA' ,'WV') and ws1.ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk and web_gmt_offset >= -5 and ws1.ws_list_price between 27 and 56 and exists (select *             from web_sales ws2             where ws1.ws_order_number = ws2.ws_order_number               and ws1.ws_warehouse_sk <> ws2.ws_warehouse_sk) and not exists(select *                from web_returns wr1                where ws1.ws_order_number = wr1.wr_order_number                and wr1.wr_reason_sk in (8, 40, 42, 53, 55)                ) order by count(distinct ws_order_number) limit 100
rewritten_query:
WITH multi_warehouse_orders AS (
 SELECT ws_order_number
 FROM web_sales
 GROUP BY ws_order_number
 HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ws_warehouse_sk) > 1
)
SELECT
 COUNT(DISTINCT ws1.ws_order_number) AS "order count",
 SUM(ws1.ws_ext_ship_cost) AS "total shipping cost",
 SUM(ws1.ws_net_profit) AS "total net profit"
FROM
 web_sales ws1
JOIN date_dim ON ws1.ws_ship_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN customer_address ON ws1.ws_ship_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN web_site ON ws1.ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk
JOIN multi_warehouse_orders ON ws1.ws_order_number = multi_warehouse_orders.ws_order_number
LEFT JOIN web_returns wr1
 ON ws1.ws_order_number = wr1.wr_order_number
 AND wr1.wr_reason_sk IN (8, 40, 42, 53, 55)
WHERE
 d_date BETWEEN '2000-10-01' AND '2000-11-30'
 AND ca_state IN ('OR', 'SC', 'TX', 'VA', 'WA', 'WV')
 AND web_gmt_offset >= -5
 AND ws1.ws_list_price BETWEEN 27 AND 56
 AND wr1.wr_order_number IS NULL
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number)
LIMIT 100

original_query: select     substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 30 ) then 1 else 0 end)  as "30 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 30) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 60) then 1 else 0 end )  as "31-60 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 60) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 90) then 1 else 0 end)  as "61-90 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 90) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as "91-120 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk  > 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as ">120 days" from    catalog_sales   ,warehouse   ,ship_mode   ,call_center   ,date_dim where d_month_seq between 1193 and 1193 + 23 and cs_ship_date_sk   = d_date_sk and cs_warehouse_sk   = w_warehouse_sk and cs_ship_mode_sk   = sm_ship_mode_sk and cs_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk and cs_list_price between 77 and 106 and sm_type = 'TWO DAY' and cc_class = 'small' and w_gmt_offset = -5 group by    substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name order by substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)         ,sm_type         ,cc_name limit 100
rewritten_query: WITH precomputed_diff AS ( SELECT substring(w.w_warehouse_name,1,20) AS warehouse_name, sm.sm_type, cc.cc_name, (cs.cs_ship_date_sk - cs.cs_sold_date_sk) AS days_diff FROM catalog_sales cs JOIN warehouse w ON cs.cs_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk JOIN ship_mode sm ON cs.cs_ship_mode_sk = sm.sm_ship_mode_sk JOIN call_center cc ON cs.cs_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_ship_date_sk = d.d_date_sk WHERE d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1193 AND 1193 + 23 AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 77 AND 106 AND sm.sm_type = 'TWO DAY' AND cc.cc_class = 'small' AND w.w_gmt_offset = -5 ) SELECT warehouse_name, sm_type, cc_name, SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "30 days", SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "31-60 days", SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "61-90 days", SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 91 AND 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "91-120 days", SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff > 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ">120 days" FROM precomputed_diff GROUP BY warehouse_name, sm_type, cc_name ORDER BY warehouse_name, sm_type, cc_name LIMIT 100

original_query: select  item1.i_item_sk, item2.i_item_sk, count(*) as cnt FROM item AS item1, item AS item2, store_sales AS s1, store_sales AS s2, date_dim, customer, customer_address, customer_demographics WHERE item1.i_item_sk < item2.i_item_sk AND s1.ss_ticket_number = s2.ss_ticket_number AND s1.ss_item_sk = item1.i_item_sk and s2.ss_item_sk = item2.i_item_sk AND s1.ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk AND d_year between 1998 and 1998 + 1 and d_date_sk = s1.ss_sold_date_sk and item1.i_category in ('Jewelry', 'Music') and item2.i_manager_id between 77 and 96 and cd_marital_status = 'W' and cd_education_status = 'Primary' and s1.ss_list_price between 236 and 250 and s2.ss_list_price between 236 and 250 GROUP BY item1.i_item_sk, item2.i_item_sk ORDER BY cnt
rewritten_query:
SELECT item1.i_item_sk, item2.i_item_sk, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM store_sales s1
JOIN store_sales s2 ON s1.ss_ticket_number = s2.ss_ticket_number
JOIN item AS item1 ON s1.ss_item_sk = item1.i_item_sk AND item1.i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Music')
JOIN item AS item2 ON s2.ss_item_sk = item2.i_item_sk AND item2.i_manager_id BETWEEN 77 AND 96
JOIN date_dim ON s1.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk AND date_dim.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 1999
JOIN customer ON s1.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
 AND customer_demographics.cd_marital_status = 'W'
 AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status = 'Primary'
WHERE item1.i_item_sk < item2.i_item_sk
 AND s1.ss_list_price BETWEEN 236 AND 250
 AND s2.ss_list_price BETWEEN 236 AND 250
GROUP BY item1.i_item_sk, item2.i_item_sk
ORDER BY cnt

original_query: select  c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name, count(*) as cnt FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01 GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name ORDER BY cnt
rewritten_query:
SELECT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM item i 
JOIN store_sales ss ON i.i_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk 
JOIN store_returns sr ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk 
JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss.ss_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk 
JOIN date_dim d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk 
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk 
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk 
JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk 
WHERE i.i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports') 
 AND d1.d_year = 1999 
 AND ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR') 
 AND hd.hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 
 AND hd.hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' 
 AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY) 
 AND ss.ss_sales_price / ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.8 AND 1.0 
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name 
ORDER BY cnt

original_query: select  c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name, count(*) as cnt FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Home', 'Men', 'Music') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('MS', 'NC', 'NM', 'OK', 'TN') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 57 * 0.01 AND 77 * 0.01 GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name ORDER BY cnt
rewritten_query: SELECT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM store_sales ss JOIN store_returns sr ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AND sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk AND i.i_category IN ('Home', 'Men', 'Music') JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk AND ca.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NC', 'NM', 'OK', 'TN') JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk AND hd.hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd.hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' JOIN date_dim d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND d1.d_year = 1999 JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY) WHERE (ss.ss_sales_price / ss.ss_list_price) BETWEEN 0.57 AND 0.77 GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name ORDER BY cnt
